title: May 24, 2026
sentiment: We build systems to hold our thoughts, and then we forget we ever thought without them.

stories.title: DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent
stories.summary: DeepSeek made permanent a significant price cut on its V4 Pro model — a signal that AI pricing is still in flux, and that the race to the bottom is a feature, not a bug.

stories.title: Show HN: Audiomass – a free, open-source multitrack audio editor for the web
stories.summary: A fully capable multitrack audio editor running in the browser — open source, no install, no catch. The browser keeps becoming more of an operating system.

stories.title: Jira Is Turing-Complete
stories.summary: Someone proved Jira can compute any Turing-complete function — a playful, unsettling reminder that the most elaborate prisons can look like ordinary offices.
